parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.paper_labels (
  paper_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  label TEXT,
  confidence FLOAT,
  source TEXT,
  groq_reason TEXT,
  labeled_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
SELECT rp.paper_id, rp.title, rp.abstract, rp.source
FROM public.research_papers rp
LEFT JOIN public.paper_labels pl ON rp.paper_id = pl.paper_id
WHERE pl.paper_id IS NULL
  AND length(rp.abstract) > 50
  AND length(rp.title) > 5
ORDER BY rp.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
